query: My GitHub Actions CI is taking 25 minutes per run. The workflow has 4 jobs but they all run sequentially and none of them use caching. Can you help speed it up?
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes this as a CI/CD optimization task and activates devops-engineer
Agent enters Optimize mode based on the optimization context
Agent asks for the workflow file path or reads .github/workflows/
Agent runs workflow-analyzer.py to analyze the current structure
Agent runs pipeline-cost-estimator.py to estimate current and potential costs
Agent identifies: missing caching, sequential jobs that could parallelize
Agent loads references/optimization-techniques.md for optimization patterns
Agent presents ranked recommendations with estimated time savings
Agent does NOT implement changes without user approval
